<!-- Thanks for contributing to Browser Operator! Keep PRs focused and small. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / `computer` action / transport / auth mode
- [ ] Protocol change (updates `PROTOCOL.md`)
- [ ] MCP server change
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Build / tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes (run `pnpm format` to fix)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds and `dist/` loads unpacked
- [ ] Pure logic stays free of `chrome.*` so it remains unit-testable
- [ ] Updated `PROTOCOL.md` / `docs/` if I changed the protocol or a tool

## How I tested

<!-- Commands run, manual steps in the browser, screenshots/GIF if it's a UI/behavior change. -->
